headline: Global Supply Chain Consultancy TMX Transform Drives Growth in the Americas
summary: CLEVELAND, April 09, 2026--TMX Transform, a global supply chain consultancy, today announced its growing presence in the Americas. Reflecting strong momentum in the region, the company has achieved a 122% compound annual growth rate since launching in the Americas in fiscal year 2024, including a 92% year-over-year growth rate between FY25 and FY26.

headline: 3 Stocks That May Be Undervalued In April 2026
summary: The United States market has shown robust growth, rising 3.0% over the last week and climbing 26% in the past year, with expectations of a 16% annual earnings increase in the coming years. In this thriving environment, identifying stocks that are potentially undervalued can present unique opportunities for investors seeking to capitalize on discrepancies between current stock prices and their intrinsic value.
